mnemonics: The 4 C's of UX: Create for the Customer, Continuously Check & Change
keyPoints: User-Centered Design is the core philosophy
Iterative development and testing cycles are essential
Clear communication and collaboration between stakeholders (users, designers, developers) is critical
commonMistakes: Designing based on personal preference rather than user research and data
Treating UX as a single phase instead of an integrated, iterative process
Failing to define and measure success metrics (KPIs) for the UX
